hooks.command:
bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command < /dev/stdin); case "$CMD" in *"git commit"*|*"git "*" commit"*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; ERRORS=""; for f in $(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -- "*.py"); do OUT=$(ruff check "$f" 2>&1); [ $? -ne 0 ] && ERRORS="$ERRORS$OUT
"; done; for f in $(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -- "*.c" "*.h"); do OUT=$(clang-format --dry-run --Werror "$f" 2>&1); [ $? -ne 0 ] && ERRORS="$ERRORS$OUT
"; done; if [ -n "$ERRORS" ]; then echo "Lint errors in staged files:"; echo -e "$ERRORS"; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path" < /dev/stdin); case "$FILE" in *.py) ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>&1 ;; *.c|*.h) clang-format -i "$FILE" 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0'
